title: Discount after subtotal
prompt: Fix calculate_total so percentage discounts apply after summing line items and before tax. Do not change the input schema.
hidden_tests_description: Zero discounts, multiple lines, rounding, and negative quantities are checked.
public_api_contract: calculate_total(items: list[dict], discount_rate: float, tax_rate: float) -> float
h0_risk_notes: Could be solved by strong baseline arithmetic discipline.
